title: “Never a dull moment” for chemical engineering student in Minnesota
summary_en: Graduating senior Mason Hamar reflects on his time with the University of Minnesota chapter of Engineers without Borders; Cargill, Inc.; Anderson Windows, and other college experiences that have left a lasting impact on him.
title_cn: 明尼苏达大学化学工程专业学生在校四年经历丰富充实
